signals.npcLine: Crypto streets bleed red, trust frays under neon shadows.
signals.questPulse: Market caps dip; tech scavengers eye fresh hauls.
signals.worldFeed: Active cryptos flicker; chaos breeds in traded codes.
signals.clueEvent: Fallen coins sputter; new ghost tokens echo faintly.

signals.npcLine: Whispers on datastreams: RAVE signal dead, others flicker.
signals.questPulse: Hunt rising nodes; pulse zero on fading tokens.
signals.worldFeed: Trading clusters downshift, survival depends on swift hacks.
signals.clueEvent: Weak nodes detected; arm up to push through noise.

signals.npcLine: PENGU rises silently; shadows lengthen on faltering AAVE.
signals.questPulse: Uncover trending echoes; decode volatile pulse shifts.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment bleeds fear; mutants avoid risky exchanges.
signals.clueEvent: Trace low-score shifts; fear drives the underground trade.

signals.npcLine: Gain edge in dark trades; AI brokers play rough.
signals.questPulse: Secure rare tokens; distrust clouds network nodes.
signals.worldFeed: Markets fracture beneath weight of paranoia and dread.
signals.clueEvent: New token hunts spawn; fear fuels frantic moves.

signals.npcLine: AAVE scars pulse; digital hitmen scout crowdfed wrecks.
signals.questPulse: Shadow brokers crawl; cryptic signals fade fast.
signals.worldFeed: NPCs trade in whispers, crypto ghosts haunt feeds.
signals.clueEvent: Fragmented chains ripple; stake claims among wreckage.
